spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12, p-24) on marketing page to let the dark aesthetic breathe. Control Room tight spacing (gap-4) in the admin panel.
spacing_and_layout.public_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. Asymmetrical grid for services (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.admin_grid: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID. Strict grid hierarchy for dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.containers: All surface containers must have 1px solid border-white/10 to ground them.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f0a500] text-[#0d1b2a] font-bold hover:bg-[#d49100] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-[#128C7E] animate-pulse z-50

surfaces.header_glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0d1b2a]/70 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.cards_marketing: bg-[#16213e] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

shadcn_overrides.notes: Customize Shadcn to minimize rounded corners (rounded-none or max rounded-md). Override standard gray borders with border-white/10. Use #f0a500 for active states and focus rings.

hero_background.description: Premium abstract dark navy background with glowing gold accents and tropical leaf shadow overlay. Use in hero section with a bg-[#0d1b2a]/40 overlay.

service_whatsapp.description: 3D WhatsApp bot floating interface. Use in Services or Portfolio section.

service_pos_invoice.description: 3D POS and electronic invoicing dashboard. Use in Services or Portfolio section.

why_us_local.description: Local Guanacaste presence visual. Use in 'Why Us' section.

about_office.description: Modern dark office interior representing the agency.

icons_and_agents.ai_agents_avatars: Use standard emojis for the 10 agents as requested. Examples: 🤖, 📊, ✍️, 💻, 📈, 📱, 🛠️, 💬, 🔍, ⚡. Render them inside a circular bg-[#16213e] container with border-white/10.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Follow the exact color hex codes provided by the user. Background must be #0d1b2a, surfaces #16213e, accents #f0a500.
Typography: Use Syne for headings with tracking-tighter and font-black/bold. Use Inter for body copy. Do not deviate from these families.

Marketing vs Admin: The public site must use raw HTML/Tailwind for bento-box layouts, heavy padding, and dramatic scales. The Admin panel uses Shadcn components customized to match the dark navy theme with tight, efficient spacing.
Media: Always use the media URLs provided in this JSON. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com or placehold.it.
Contrast: When placing text over the hero image, use a background overlay (e.g., bg-[#0d1b2a]/50 or a gradient) to guarantee APCA contrast minimums.
Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and key interactive elements using kebab-case role-based names (e.g. data-testid='contact-form-submit').

Shadcn Configuration: Override the default Vercel look. Reduce border-radius (rounded-sm or rounded-none) and rely on 1px subtle borders (border-white/10). Active states/rings should use the #f0a500 gold.
Navigation: Include a sidebar for the admin panel and a glassmorphism sticky header for the public landing page.
WhatsApp Float: Ensure the public site has a fixed floating WhatsApp button with an animate-pulse effect.
